title: ON-VEHICLE INSPECTION — Power Steering

figures_detected.description: Drive belt routing diagram showing water pump, power steering pump, idler, and crankshaft pulleys with front-of-vehicle direction arrow
Power steering fluid reservoir cap/dipstick being checked
Steering wheel with spring scale attached, showing measurement after turning 360° from neutral position
Rack and tie-rod assembly with tool attached for measuring rack sliding force

content_blocks.text: Check the power steering drive belt is correctly tensioned. Refer to MA section for full details of belt tensioning procedures and specifications.
Fluid level should be checked when fluid is cold.

CAUTION:
• Do not overfill.
• Recommended fluid is Automatic Transmission Fluid "DEXRON™" type.

steps.text: Park vehicle on a level, dry surface and set parking brake.
Bring power steering fluid up to adequate operating temperature. [Make sure temperature of fluid is approximately 60 to 80°C (140 to 176°F).]
Tires need to be inflated to normal pressure.
Check steering wheel turning force when steering wheel has been turned 360° from neutral position.
notes: Steering wheel turning force: 44.1 N (4.5 kg, 9.9 lb) or less

steps.text: If steering wheel turning force is out of specifications, check rack sliding force to detect condition of steering gear assembly.
Disconnect steering column lower joint and knuckle arms from the gear.
Start and run engine at idle to make sure steering fluid has reached normal operating temperature.
While pulling tie-rod slowly from the neutral position, make sure rack sliding force is within specification.
notes: Rack sliding force: 147 N (15 kg, 33 lb) or less

steps.text: If rack sliding force is not within specification, replace steering gear assembly.

items.label: Steering wheel turning force (after turning 360° from neutral)
items.condition: Engine running, fluid at 60–80°C (140–176°F), tires at normal pressure

items.label: Rack sliding force
items.condition: Engine at idle, steering column lower joint and knuckle arms disconnected, fluid at operating temperature

content_blocks.description: Drive belt routing for power steering pump

cross_references: MA section — belt tensioning procedures and specifications
model_notes: Power steering variant only. Recommended fluid: ATF DEXRON™ type.
